summary: Tested Vendor Notification System. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Fixed environment variable bug in frontend (EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL → EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL). Frontend UI testing limited due to React Native Web + Playwright known limitations with Zustand auth state hydration.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web with Zustand persist middleware doesn't hydrate state from externally injected localStorage - known RN Web limitation

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: vendor-notifications.tsx and profile.tsx used EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL but .env defines EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL - updated to correct env var
VERIFIED: GET /api/vendor/notifications returns notifications[], total, unread_count correctly
VERIFIED: GET /api/vendor/notifications/unread-count returns correct unread count
VERIFIED: PATCH /api/vendor/notifications/{id}/read marks single notification as read
VERIFIED: PATCH /api/vendor/notifications/read-all marks all as read
VERIFIED: Notifications created via rate-vendor and report-issue endpoints (create_vendor_notification helper)
VERIFIED: vendor-notifications.tsx uses correct token key 'token' for AsyncStorage
VERIFIED: profile.tsx has polling (30s) for unread count, shows badge with conditional {unreadNotifCount > 0 ? ...}
VERIFIED: _layout.tsx line 18 registers vendor-notifications route correctly

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified, env var bug fixed. UI automation blocked by RN Web auth limitations.

seed_data_creation: Created test notification notif_test_c510f531 with is_read=false to test unread badge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor notification system fully implemented. Backend APIs work correctly. Frontend files updated to use correct EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL env var. vendor_notifications collection stores notifications with fields: notification_id, vendor_id, type, title, message, data, is_read, created_at. Notifications are created when: 1) Vendor is rated (rate-vendor endpoint), 2) Issue is reported (report-issue endpoint). Profile page polls unread count every 30 seconds. Known RN Web limitations prevent full Playwright UI testing.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_found: Frontend used wrong environment variable EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL instead of EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Inconsistent env var naming between frontend files
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Updated vendor-notifications.tsx and profile.tsx to use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
rca_of_the_issue.impact: API calls would have failed as API_URL fell back to empty string
